name: ZeroSSL
description: ZeroSSL — free and paid SSL certificate provider with ACME support and REST API.

seo.title: ZeroSSL — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: ZeroSSL: ZeroSSL — free and paid SSL certificate provider with ACME support and REST API.

when_to_use: Free TLS certificate via ACME REST API for automation
Paid OV and EV certificate with validation workflow API
Let's Encrypt alternative with 90-day auto-renewable certs
Multi-domain SAN certificate for SaaS platform subdomains
ACME client integration for Caddy, Nginx, and Traefik

pros: Free DV certs plus paid OV/EV options
ACME support with unique EAB flow
cons: Smaller trust footprint vs Let's Encrypt
Free tier rate limits can be restrictive
Paid tiers less competitive than DigiCert
review.verdict: A credible Let's Encrypt alternative with a useful API; usually a backup, not the default.
review.best_for: Teams wanting API-driven cert issuance with optional paid tiers.
review.not_for: Users fully served by Let's Encrypt and standard ACME clients.
